name: ollama
description: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

latestRelease.notes: ## Faster Gemma 4 on Apple Silicon Gemma 4 is now significantly faster in Ollama on Apple Silicon, generating tokens nearly 90% faster on average across a coding-agent benchmark by leveraging multi-token prediction (MTP). name: vllm
description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

latestRelease.notes:
# vLLM v0.24.0 Release Notes

## Highlights

This release features 571 commits from 256 contributors (77 new)!

* **MiniMax-M3**: Added support for the new **MiniMax-M3** model (#45381), with a fast follow-on of BF16/FP8 indexer via MSA (#45892), MXFP4 support (#45896), FP8 sparse GQA (#45744), and extensive AMD/ROCm tuning — mxfp8 MoE/linear on gfx950 (#45725), fp8_per_channel for bf16 weights on MI300X (#45854), FP8 KV-cache fix (#45720), and packed-modules mapping (#45794). name: litellm
description: Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]

latestRelease.notes:
## Verify Docker Image Signature

All LiteLLM Docker images are signed with [cosign](https://docs.sigstore.dev/cosign/overview/). Every release is signed with the same key introduced in [commit `0112e53`](https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/commit/0112e53046018d726492c814b3644b7d376029d0).

**Verify using the pinned commit hash (recommended):**

A commit hash is cryptographically immutable, so this is the strongest way to ensure you are using the original signing key:

```bash
cosign verify \
  -

Changes since 1.2.7

* release(langgraph): 1.2.8 (#8292)
* fix: delta channel bug with updateState on fresh thread will force snapshot instead of stub checkpoint (#8290)
* chore(deps): bump the minor-and-patch group in /libs/langgraph with 8 updates (#8255)
* chore(deps): bump websockets from 15.0.1 to 16.0 in /libs/langgraph in the major group (#8256)
* chore(deps): bump the minor-and-patch group in /libs/sdk-py with 9 updates (#8252)
